body.title: Fable pressure-test: the nexus write-side does not exist — the starve-curve numerator is structurally zero
body.text:
Fable (Plan-subagent, model=fable) pressure-tested the compiled-inference / cortical-columns thesis toward a PROOF PROGRAM on 2026-07-05. Brief: ~/.unseen_university/... via scratchpad FABLE_BRIEF_pressure_test_thesis.md. Relates to [[compiled-inference-thesis]], [[text-cortex-and-emotion-modulation]], I-compiled-inference-residue, I-self-improving-process.

== HEADLINE (all [V] re-verified by CC via grep/inspection) ==
The write-side of the nexus does NOT exist in the running system. The starve-curve numerator (questions answered warm, out of the LLM) is not unmeasured — it is STRUCTURALLY ZERO. No question has ever moved out of the LLM inside the coding loop because no mechanism exists to move one.
- build_packet.py (the starvation-gate artifact, shipped+proven today as a compiler) is imported NOWHERE in unseen_university/ — only tests/, devlab/claudecode/, and the CC sprint SKILL. The DS runtime coding loop uses the thinner build_signature_map instead. The keystone and the instrumented loop are on TWO DIFFERENT ROADS and don't touch. [V: grep]
- teach-on-miss: ZERO .py implementation (design node only). [V: grep]
- archivist/learning_pipeline.py process_overnight(): explicit stub ('drains queue... Full compiler ships later'). [V: read]
- archivist.knowledge_patterns table absent (pattern_intercept reads a dead table). [V: corroborated live in funnel logs]
The docs work walls 1-3 (question-identity, reference frames, invalidation triangle — the interesting walls); the BLOCKING wall is the unglamorous one: nothing writes.

== Q2 — TRUE BLOCKER, ranked by what-blocks-MEASUREMENT ==
Rank 0 (blind spot, absolute): no nexus write-path in the coding loop. Min viable nexus = a flat table (question_normal_form, answer, falsifier, ticket_id, created_at) with exact/structural keys; and JOIN the two roads (wire build_packet into CodingDomain._initial_message, OR run the experiment purely in the DS loop with the signature map — pick ONE loop).
Rank 1 — Wall 4 (triage/starvation-gate): half-exists (sufficiency_gate, signature map, _token_measurement) but not connected to dispatch accounting; nothing can say 'this dispatch was avoided because the gate answered it'.
Rank 2 — Wall 1 (question-identity): dodgeable at datapoint 1 (orientation Q key = path+content_hash). WARNING: the EXISTING identity impl (pattern_intercept's 4-keyword Jaccard returning a cached answer as if the model said it) IS the silent-wrongness machine — keep fuzzy matching OUT of the measurement path; exact keys only.
Rank 3 — Wall 2 (invalidation triangle): doesn't block datapoint 1 (frozen snapshot), but store the falsifier column from record 1 (impossible retrofit later).
Rank 4 — Wall 3 (intent-preservation): blocks interpretation not measurement; guard with the quality line.

== Q1 — FIRST EXPERIMENT (minimal, concrete) ==
Unit of question: one ARCHITECT-loop orientation turn (a Read/Bash world-lookup). Stream: replay 20-30 CLOSED coding tickets through CodingDomain on a FROZEN repo snapshot, ARCHITECT ONLY, escalation walk pinned to one tier. Arms: (1) orientation prefix OFF; (2) prefix ON static (today); (3) prefix ON + accumulating nexus (every architect Read/Bash answer written to the flat nexus keyed by (path, content_hash, question_kind); each next ticket's packet enriched with matching nexus entries). Metric (the curve): cold-path dispatch count + tokens-to-substantive-plan per ticket vs ticket index — ALWAYS joined with a QUALITY line (substantive-plan rate; optional editor apply/test success). Arm 3 falling below arm 2 as index grows = first real datapoint of a question moving out of the LLM by accumulation. Arm 3 ~= arm 2 flat = the turn-is-not-the-question falsification.
Missing to run it (all [V] absent): (1) the nexus write-path; (2) warm-hit capture (today a cache hit produces NO corpus record — try_intercept returns at device.py ~432-437 BEFORE _capture_io fires); (3) role/turn labels on corpus records (architect vs editor only recoverable by grepping system-prompt text); (4) the replay harness. Corpus is ready but ~empty (9 test records).

== Q3 — VISIBILITY GAPS the every-byte corpus still can't show ==
1. Warm hits bypass capture entirely (must emit corpus record outcome='warm' + nexus id + identity score + falsifier state). 2. Question-equivalence decision log (hit/miss/near-miss score) — needed to diagnose plateau vs wrong-hit rot. 3. Role/turn/parent chain on dispatch records (InferenceRequest has ticket/agent/session but NO role/purpose) — the only way to test the 3-layer differential-starvation sub-claim. 4. The quality line joined to the curve as ONE artifact (bending curve can be rot). 5. Nexus demography: reuse counts, invalidation-deaths, distinct-question-count over time (the denominator + churn half-life).

== Q4 — WHERE MEASUREMENT WOULD FALSIFY (past the docs' own attacks) ==
1. The TURN IS NOT THE QUESTION (sharpest near-term risk): a loop turn does orientation+planning+self-conditioning at once; deleting the lookup may not delete the turn. Falsifying signature: arm 3 cuts tool-calls but not dispatches/tokens-to-plan. 2. CHURN OUTRUNS RECURRENCE: on a living repo, falsifiers may fire faster than questions recur (warm entries die before first reuse); decision rule: median reuse-before-invalidation < 1 → the economic claim fails on this domain even with perfect identity. 3. The build process is an ANTI-REPETITION MACHINE (closing a ticket removes its question class); if recurrence of question-normal-forms ~0 at every grain, the plateau isn't novelty — it's the wrong domain for the rung. Cheap pre-test: mine session logs/corpus for recurrence rates. 4. ANSWER-SHAPE DECAY: nexus serves stored text into an evolving prompt; the graph 'answers in its own shape' coherence doesn't transfer to text-in-prompt. 5. THE COST FRAME MAY BE INVERTED: local inference is near-free, warden+identity machinery is expensive+rot-prone; the curve could bend and still lose to 'call the free local model every time'. The thesis survives only in its SELF-AWARENESS form — the nexus as inspectable/invalidatable knowledge is the destination; cost is a road-metric. Measurement will force relabeling cost as a proxy for LEGIBILITY.

== Q5 — SELF-IMPROVING SUCCESSOR (highest-leverage use of the expiring window) ==
Every blocker here was found by CLAIMS-VS-REALITY auditing (diff between what memory nodes assert exists and what grep/to_regclass says exists). Build: (1) architecture nodes carry MACHINE-CHECKABLE EXISTENCE ASSERTIONS (module path, table name, wiring point); a nightly ZERO-INFERENCE device marks each claim live/stub/dead — the warden pattern pointed at the project's OWN SELF-MODEL (answer=architecture node, falsifier=codebase, intent=thesis). UU owns this concept; never aimed it at itself. (2) metric-to-capture tracing: any node naming a measurable must link to the query that computes it from live data; a measurable with no query is auto-flagged (the starve-curve fails this today — numerator uncaptured). (3) a first-datapoint forcing function: every hypothesis node requires the minimal experiment + ranked-by-measurement-blocking blockers. (4) The bootstrap: convert findings like THIS artifact into structured claims a dumb checker re-verifies forever — the successor is the warden pointed at the project's beliefs about itself + a scheduler that ranks by what-blocks-measurement.

== FUNNEL corroboration (same session) ==
Re-run of T-uu-rename-flags-to-run_flags on devstral@Hex AFTER today's architect read-window fix: plan_handed_off=true, architect_no_plan=false, plan_chars=1304, nonlocal_calls=0 ($0). The architect fix WORKED (clean handoff). New bottleneck: EDITOR — outcome=max_turns(80), edits_attempted=20, thrashing. Separate from this finding.
